categories.title: Leagues & local competition
categories.description: Organized league play and recurring tournaments in the region.

categories.title: Websites & reference
categories.description: Rules, machine info, news, and community hubs online.

categories.title: Parts & repair
categories.description: Suppliers and references for boards, playfields, and shop work.

categories.title: Major events & shows
categories.description: Larger pinball festivals and championships worth planning for.

resources.title: New England Pinball League
resources.summary: One of the region's most active leagues, with weekly competitive pinball nights across New England, including SNHPC.
resources.description: A great mix of welcoming community and serious play: check season schedules, track weekly results, and follow standings as players compete throughout the region.

resources.title: Northeast Pinball Challenge
resources.summary: Federation of pinball leagues across New England with local seasons and Grand Finals for top finishers.
resources.description: Play at participating locations, compete for league prizes, and qualify for the NPC team and individual finals (IFPA-submitted). Seasons and finals venues are announced on the site.

resources.title: International Flipper Pinball Association
resources.summary: Worldwide rankings and sanctioned event standards.

resources.title: Belles & Chimes Pinball
resources.summary: International network of inclusive women-led pinball leagues with local chapters.
resources.description: Find a nearby chapter or resources to start one in your area.

resources.title: Internet Pinball Database
resources.summary: Machine photos, production numbers, and technical notes.

resources.title: Pinball Map
resources.summary: Crowdsourced map of public pinball locations with machine lists, status updates, and directions.

resources.title: Pixels & Pinball
resources.summary: New England pinball retailer: new games, preorders, and arcade gear; official partner of the New England Pinball League.
resources.description: Shop for in-stock and preorder titles, accessories, and arcade products—handy for buyers in the region and for following local retail and league news.

resources.title: Match Play Events
resources.summary: Tournament web app: discover events, register, and follow live brackets and results—common for IFPA tournaments and league play.
resources.description: Players use it to find competitions and track pairings; organizers use it to run draws, scoring, and standings in the browser.

resources.title: Pinventory
resources.summary: Fleet and collection management: machine status, maintenance history, spare parts, revenue, and QR codes so players can report issues without installing an app.
resources.description: Aimed at operators and serious collectors; can link machines to the Kineticist database for manufacturer info and images.

resources.title: Kineticist
resources.summary: Pinball news, articles, and a game database including the Hype Index.

resources.title: Punk Rock Pinball
resources.summary: Pinball podcast, community coverage, event content, and blog posts from an indie scene perspective.
resources.description: Includes the Punk Rock Pinball Podcast, PRPA content, and location/event writeups.

resources.title: Marco Specialties
resources.summary: Common parts, rubber kits, LEDs, and boards.

resources.title: Mitchell Lighting
resources.summary: Pinball LED bulbs and kits tuned for a warm, vintage arcade look—modern efficiency without losing that classic glow.
resources.description: Popular for restorations and upgrades when you want incandescent-style color and diffusion with less heat and maintenance than old bulbs.

resources.title: The Pinball Resource
resources.summary: Large inventory of factory and reproduction parts, plus manuals and technical references.
resources.description: Long-running parts supplier with deep coverage for Gottlieb and other manufacturers.

resources.title: Pintastic New England
resources.summary: Large regional show with games on free play, vendors, and tournaments.
resources.description: Dates and venue vary year to year—check the site for the next event.

resources.title: PinFest
resources.summary: Long-running pinball show with free-play machines, vendors, tournaments, and a flea market.
resources.description: Hosted in Allentown, PA; dates and registration links are posted on the official site each year.
